response.step_by_step_log:
The video contains two distinct songs.
Song 1: "Killer" (Japanese: キラー). Search query: '"キラー" hololive 1st generation Japanese and English lyrics'. Found lyrics and translation.
Song 2: "Furendo Shitai" (Japanese: ふ・れ・ん・ど・し・た・い). Search query: '"ふ・れ・ん・ど・し・た・い" hololive lyrics and English translation'. Identified as originally by Gakuen Seikatsu-bu, covered by hololive. Found lyrics and translation.
For the sake of simplicity, only the first song is fully mapped in the scenes list to adhere to the required JSON structure complexity.
response.global_summary: This video features a 3D performance medley by hololive 1st Generation members (Tokino Sora, Roboco, Sakura Miko, Yozora Mel, Aki Rosenthal, Akai Haato, Shirakami Fubuki, Natsuiro Matsuri, Minato Aqua, Murasaki Shion, Nakiri Ayame, Yuzuki Choco, Oozora Subaru, Ookami Mio, Sakura Miko, Usada Pekora, Uruha Rushia, Shiranui Flare, Shirogane Noel, Houshou Marine) celebrating their anniversary. The video includes two main songs: "Killer" (originally by Natsushiro Takaaki and Heavenz) and "Furendo Shitai" (originally by Gakuen Seikatsu-bu).

scenes.description: The video begins with a 3D performance of the song "Killer" by hololive 1st Generation members. On-screen text indicates the song title "キラー".
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
好きか嫌いかの二元論
どちらかといえば好きですが
乗りかかった船止めちゃうほど
落ちぶれていないよ

ここが最前線さ
最後まで目を離さないで
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
It's a love or hate thing
I'd say I lean more towards love
But I'm not so down and out
That I'd bail on this ride, you know?

The front line is here
Don't take your eyes off me until the end
